papers_mined.title: Molecular Basis of Infrared Detection by Snakes (PMC)
papers_mined.note: Pit organ thin membrane suspended in hollow chamber, mitochondria-rich, vascularized; nerve fibers constantly firing at low baseline rate; deviation from local thermal radiation baseline triggers excitation.

papers_mined.title: Infrared sensing in snakes (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Neutral range determined by AVERAGE THERMAL RADIATION of background; differential firing above-baseline.

papers_mined.note: Detects thermal contrast against background; differential sensing.

papers_mined.note: Air contact on either side of membrane; cool-side air reference.
